title: wedelia callosa
intro: Wedelia callosa, also known as Tawada or Wild Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia callosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Wedelia callosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
